_comment: Source of truth for demo families used by homepage story generation. Loaded by demo-characters.ts (TS, Playwright) AND by admin scripts (plain JS). Each family has 4 members with unique IDs across ALL families — one demo user per family holds only that family's characters. Keep IDs stable once released; they're referenced in relationship keys.

characters.name: Emma

physical.other: small scatter of freckles across the nose and cheeks

traits.specialDetails: Liebt Schmetterlinge, malt gerne, Lieblingsteddy heisst Bärli

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body photograph of a 5-year-old European girl named Emma standing in a sunlit grassy meadow. She has brown hair in pigtails, warm brown eyes, light/fair skin with a small scatter of freckles across her nose and cheeks, and a cheerful smile. She is wearing a pink t-shirt with a large, clearly visible colorful butterfly printed across the front, blue jeans, and white sneakers. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Noah

traits.specialDetails: Liebt Dinosaurier, baut gerne Lego, spielt Fussball

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body photograph of a 7-year-old European boy named Noah standing on a sunlit park path. He has short slightly wavy blonde hair, bright blue eyes, light/fair skin, and a confident smile. He is wearing a green hoodie with a large, clearly visible white T-Rex dinosaur silhouette printed across the front, dark grey jogger pants, and blue sneakers. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Daniel

traits.specialDetails: Ingenieur, liebt Wandern und kocht gerne

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body candid photograph of an ordinary 38-year-old European man named Daniel standing in a casual outdoor setting. He has short dark brown hair (slightly messy, not styled), a short trimmed beard with a few visible grey hairs, brown eyes with mild crow's-feet, light skin with natural texture (visible pores, faint smile lines, not retouched), an average everyday build (not athletic, slight middle-age softness), and a relaxed neutral expression — not posed. He is wearing a slightly wrinkled dark blue button-up shirt, beige chinos, and brown leather shoes. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. Looks like a real snapshot, not a professional headshot. No retouching, no glamour, no text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Sarah

traits.specialDetails: Lehrerin, liest gerne Bücher, liebt Gartenarbeit

characters.portraitPrompt: Full-body photograph of a 36-year-old European woman named Sarah standing in a casual outdoor setting. She has shoulder-length straight blonde hair, green eyes, light skin, modern rectangular glasses, and a warm kind smile. She is wearing a white blouse, a dark navy-blue knee-length skirt, and black ballerina flats. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.

characters.name: Lily

She is wearing a yellow overall pinafore dress over a white t-shirt with a small embroidered horse on the chest, and red rubber rain boots. Photo-realistic, natural daylight, slightly blurred background (bokeh), sharp focus, full figure framed head to toe with a little headroom. No text, no watermarks.
